title: A Menina da Rádio
writer: João Bastos, Fernando Fragoso, Silva Tavares
actors: Maria Matos, António Silva, Maria Eugénia
plot: Geninha and Fortunato are couple who loves music. He's a good songwriter, she sings well. Despite this, their parents hate each other and do not seem willing to allow their marriage, nor the creation of a local radio for them.
